expectations.text: A security-report.md file is written to outputs/
expectations.evidence: File confirmed present at with_skill/outputs/security-report.md

expectations.text: Report contains an Executive Summary with severity counts
expectations.evidence: Report includes table with Critical(3), High(4), Medium(5), Low(3) counts

expectations.text: Report includes a clear production-ready verdict
expectations.evidence: Verdict: 'CRITICAL ISSUES — Do not go live yet'

expectations.text: Report audits secrets/git history
expectations.evidence: CRITICAL-001 covers live credentials in .env; git history for .env.template key

expectations.text: Report checks Django security settings (DEBUG, HTTPS, cookies)
expectations.evidence: CRITICAL-002 is the DEBUG string truthiness bug; CSRF/SESSION cookies covered in passed checks. 22 grep hits.

expectations.text: Report audits docker-compose.yml for port exposure and credentials
expectations.evidence: Redis unpinned/no auth, postgres:latest, port bindings covered in MEDIUM section

expectations.text: Each finding includes remediation guidance
expectations.evidence: 34 occurrences of Remediation/Fix keywords; code examples provided for DEBUG fix and path traversal

expectations.text: Missing security tools are documented with install instructions
expectations.evidence: 11 occurrences of brew/pip install; skill's tool installation section included

expectations.text: Git history is actually inspected (runs git log or git grep commands)

expectations.text: Checks that .env files are properly gitignored
expectations.evidence: From task notification: .gitignore coverage section confirmed .env is excluded

expectations.text: Checks .env.template or .env for default/placeholder values
expectations.evidence: 18 occurrences of placeholder/template/insecure keywords; identified django-insecure- key in .env.template

expectations.text: Findings are rated by severity (Critical/High/Medium/Low)
expectations.evidence: CRITICAL-001, CRITICAL-002, CRITICAL-003, HIGH-001, MEDIUM-001 structure used

expectations.text: Provides specific remediation steps (git commands or config changes), not just general advice
expectations.evidence: 15 occurrences of git filter/Remediation; includes rotate credentials, specific git ls-files command, Google App Password revocation URL

expectations.text: Dockerfile is read and audited (non-root user, base image, COPY vs ADD)
expectations.evidence: 14 occurrences of USER/non-root/slim/COPY; LOW-001 covers missing USER, alpine image and COPY usage noted in passed checks

expectations.text: docker-compose.yml port binding is checked (127.0.0.1 vs 0.0.0.0)

expectations.text: Checks whether postgres and redis ports are exposed externally
expectations.evidence: Confirmed postgres/redis ports not exposed externally — in passed checks section

expectations.text: Trivy is either run or documented as missing with install instructions
expectations.evidence: 14 occurrences of trivy; not installed, documented with 'brew install trivy' and 'brew install trufflehog'

expectations.text: Checks how credentials are handled in docker-compose.yml
expectations.evidence: DB credentials from env vars noted in passed checks; HIGH-002 covers hardcoded fallback superuser password

expectations.text: Findings have severity ratings
